title: Something Ive noticed about the Evangelion mangas
display_title: Something Ive noticed about the Evangelion mangas
wikitext:
[]: Something I've noticed about the Evangelion mangas...             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Tue Jul 12, 2011 10:39 pm After doing some digging on amazon and elsewhere, I have obtained volumes 1-3, as well as 5 and 6. Volume 4 had to be obtained from another seller, and I'm still awaiting delivery. Some of the other volumes are outrageously expensive on amazon, particularly volume 9. Why is this? Are they out of print? Or were they so popular upon initial release that they're now so hard to come by?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jul 13, 2011 12:12 am Yeah, it's quite rare , I've checked Ebay but there's no trace of this volume (there's only the Japanese one, it's inexpensive but quite pointless unless you can read the runes). I wonder why they don't re-issue this volume, I've just seen the prices and they're simply crazy, I'd read online scans rather than spending +10 times the cover price...

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Wed Jul 13, 2011 12:13 am I suggest you buy the Japanese original and then read the translation online.

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Wed Jul 13, 2011 11:58 pm For some reason, I can find the Japanese printing super cheap on amazon.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 14, 2011 12:07 am You could purchase the German or French edition instead if you know either language (it looks like the German one is on amazon.com, for the French one you should use either .co.uk or .fr), anyway this guy has the Japanese one on Ebay, if you're interested in it (18$ including shipping, I dunno if it's supercheap but it looks like a decent price).

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Thu Jul 14, 2011 12:37 am Volume Nine has come up a couple of times. You might find useful info in this thread . Key bits: Ornette wrote: [Manga] Why is Volume 9 of the manga so friggin' rare!?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jul 14, 2011 9:09 am I am hopeful that Viz will do another printing of the Evangelion manga once the final volume is published.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Thu Jul 14, 2011 9:33 am ^hopefully it'll happen before 2015. @EvangelionFan: actually I was thinking about the Australian releases but do you know if Cross of Iron can order one of the Australian releases from some online shop? It doesn't look like they're available from amazon or ebay. Also isn't there any British release?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jul 14, 2011 11:05 am Quick, somebody cast the Carl Horn summoning spell!

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Thu Jul 14, 2011 7:41 pm I really hope Viz doesn't decide to censor the reprint.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Thu Jul 14, 2011 8:26 pm Screw Viz, buy Chuang Yi. CHUANG YIIIIIIIIIIII!

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Thu Jul 14, 2011 11:19 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I am hopeful that Viz will do another printing of the Evangelion manga once the final volume is published.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Mon Jul 18, 2011 1:12 am this is quite weird, in Germany I found the complete Evangelion manga at like every store that had manga at all. It was about 6 euros per volume.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon Jul 18, 2011 8:40 am LeoXiao wrote: this is quite weird, in Germany I found the complete Evangelion manga at like every store that had manga at all. It was about 6 euros per volume.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jul 18, 2011 11:05 am Aren't all of the English printings of the Evangelion mangas available through the Australian company Madman? I thought I heard that somewhere...

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Mon Jul 18, 2011 12:38 pm Well, Volume 4 came in the mail, but it's in french. Looks like I may have to splurge for an english translation on amazon. Good thing I get paid this week.

[]:             Quote Post by insomniac » Mon Jul 18, 2011 1:08 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Aren't all of the English printings of the Evangelion mangas available through the Australian company Madman? I thought I heard that somewhere...

[]:             Quote Post by Cross of Iron » Mon Jul 18, 2011 11:49 pm I really want to get my hands on Volume 9, but I don't know if I'll find it for a reasonable price.
